places.name: Yongma Land Abandoned Theme Park
places.description: Plenty of old carney magic still haunts this photogenic amusement park.

places.description: About as hidden as can be, this specialty coffee shop is wedged between multi-story buildings at the end of a dark, skinny alleyway in Seoul.

places.name: Banpo Bridge Moonlight Rainbow Fountain
places.description: The world's longest bridge fountain has hundreds of nozzles that create a beautiful, illuminated spectacle.

places.name: Seodaemun Prison
places.description: A chilling monument to Korean patriots who resisted the Japanese occupation.

places.description: A remnant of Korea's colonial past lies forgotten in a hip neighborhood in Seoul.

places.name: Owl Art and Craft Museum
places.description: One man's lifetime collection of tiny objects of wisdom gathered from around the world, on display for public enjoyment.
